articles.description: U.S. stocks closed mostly lower as President Trump's conflicting messages on Iran and escalating Middle East conflict weighed on markets.  Despite optimism over discussions, threats to the Strait of Hormuz and Iranian oil facilities fueled investor concerns.  Fed Chair Powell's comments on inflation offered some support, while financial stocks rose on new 401(k) guidelines.

topStories.title: Rubio says NATO must be re-examined after Spain blocks US operation on Iran
topStories.description: Marco Rubio said it was “very disappointing” that NATO allies blocked the use of their bases for the US's war on Iran.

topStories.title: As more Americans adopt AI tools, fewer say they can trust the results
topStories.description: AI adoption is rising in the U.S., but trust remains low, with most Americans concerned about transparency, regulation, and the technology’s broader societal impact, according to a new Quinnipiac poll.

topStories.description: The US has reopened its embassy in Venezuela, nearly three months after it abducted the former leader Nicolas Maduro.

topStories.title: Rubio denies US actions punitive, blames Cuba for economic failures
topStories.description: In exclusive interview with Al Jazeera, the US secretary of state downplays US role in the island nation's fuel crisis.

topStories.title: Trump warns Iran to ‘immediately’ reopen Strait of Hormuz, threatens strikes on oil sites, power plants & Kharg Island
topStories.description: President Trump warned Iran that the US may escalate its response if a deal is not reached soon regarding the Strait of Hormuz. He mentioned potential strikes on key Iranian infrastructure while expressing confidence in ongoing discussions with ‘new’ leadership in Iran.

topStories.title: French police make two more arrests over foiled attack on Bank of America
topStories.description: Prosecutors investigating suspected link to Iran war due to similarities with other recent attempted attacks in Europe.

topStories.title: Cuba waits for Russian oil tanker to arrive amid US blockade
topStories.description: After a US blockade, Cuba is waiting on the arrival of a sanctioned Russian tanker carrying thousands of barrels of oil.

topStories.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio hailed progress in Venezuela, saying it is beginning to see "the kind of stability that brings businesses back."

topStories.description: Airports like JFK and Houston report shorter wait times, though LaGuardia still faces delays of up to two hours.

dailyNews.title: Congress Candidate Assaulted In Assam, Party Workers Stage Protests
dailyNews.description: Assam elections: Sunil Chhetri, a former president of the All Assam Gorkha Students' Union, was attacked by a group that the Congress alleged comprised BJP workers.

dailyNews.title: Barbie Dream Fest in Florida to issue refunds after fan complaints
dailyNews.description: Fans, who paid up to $450 (£340), complained of a grey convention centre backdrop and a "swag bag" that included only a plastic pouch with a Barbie hand sanitiser.

dailyNews.title: Parliament Budget Session updates: Maoism has been almost eradicated from Bastar, the region is now on the path of development, says Amit Shah
dailyNews.description: Congress MP Digvijaya Singh says CAPF Bill will make the discriminations faced by the officials permanent as RS takes up discussion on CAPF (General Administration) Bill, 2026

dailyNews.title: Trump interested in Arab partners footing Iran war bill: White House
dailyNews.description: Trump interested in Arab partners footing Iran war bill White House

dailyNews.title: Watch | ‘Loser’ Lego Trump receives Iran’s message in satirical video: ‘Come closer’
dailyNews.description: The animation opens with a Lego version of Trump seated in the Oval Office, appearing under pressure as he gazes out at large crowds protesting outside.

dailyNews.title: ICE announces death of another Mexican detainee in US immigration custody
dailyNews.description: Mexico's President Claudia Sheinbaum says her country will take steps to protest death of another Mexican citizen in US.

dailyNews.title: White House ballroom project: Trump reveals military building large complex beneath it, says 'we're ahead of schedule'
dailyNews.description: US President Trump revealed plans for a large military complex beneath a new ballroom at the White House. The ballroom project, one of the most undertakings at White House in more than a century, has expanded significantly, with its privately funded budget rising from $200 million to $400 million.

dailyNews.title: Explained | Why more Americans are applying for Canadian citizenship after new ancestry law
dailyNews.description: Millions of Americans are now seeking to apply for Canadian citizenship, provided they can prove direct lineage in the country. But why is there an uptick in US applicants for Canadian citizenship?

dailyNews.title: ‘Strait of Hormuz will reopen one way or another’, Rubio tells Al Jazeera
dailyNews.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio has told Al Jazeera that the US will not accept Iran’s claim over the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Fire contained after missile attack on oil refinery in Israel’s Haifa
dailyNews.description: Attack marks second time Oil Refineries facility in northern Israel targeted during US-Israeli war on Iran.

dailyNews.title: Egypt’s president urges Trump to stop war on Iran
dailyNews.description: Egypt’s President Abdel Fattah el-Sisi has called on Trump to end the war on Iran.

dailyNews.description: Karoline Leavitt pushes back on war crimes question after Trump threatened to obliterate Iranian power plants and oil wells over the Hormuz Strait.

topStories.description: Rahm Emanuel says the 2028 Democratic race should be about ideas, not gender, as he mulls a White House bid and pushes a middle-class-focused platform.

topStories.title: SEE THE DIFFERENCE: Emergency TSA lanes undergo drastic transformation at major airport after Trump action
topStories.description: Emergency security lanes at Houston’s George Bush Intercontinental Airport were seen being cleared by staff on Monday after President Donald Trump signed an executive order to pay TSA.

dailyNews.title: Trump threatens to invade Iran, "obliterate" its energy resources
dailyNews.description: Energy markets remain volatile as President Trump threatens Iran with an invasion to seize its oil while also suggesting a deal could soon end the war.

dailyNews.title: Karoline Leavitt gives update on Iran talks in White House press briefing
dailyNews.description: White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt spoke to reporters Monday about negotiations concerning the Iran war. CBS News White House reporter Aaron Navarro has more.

dailyNews.title: Latest on U.S. troop buildup in Middle East as Trump says there are "lots of alternatives" in Iran
dailyNews.description: Thousands more U.S. forces are arriving in the Middle East as the war in Iran enters its second month. CBS News Pentagon reporter Eleanor Watson has more.

dailyNews.title: Trump administration scaling back asylum crackdown, sources say
dailyNews.description: The unprecedented move amounted to an indefinite suspension of all asylum requests filed outside of immigration court, regardless of the applicant's nationality.

dailyNews.title: 3/30: Face the Nation
dailyNews.description: This week on "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan," Major Garrett speaks to UAW president Shawn Fain as the Trump administration deals with upcoming tariffs with the markets sliding up and down and consumer confidence sliding. Plus, Sen. Mark Warner joins to discuss the Trump administration's mistake of its own making — sharing attack plans over an app.

dailyNews.title: Trump Claims ‘Regime Change’ in Iran Is Already Complete
dailyNews.description: President Trump suggested that Iran’s current leaders were “much more reasonable” as he sought to show progress in his war aims. Iran’s power structure appears firmly in control despite a month of U.S.-Israeli attacks.

dailyNews.title: ‘I Think That MAGA Is Dying:’ Inside the Youth Movement at CPAC
dailyNews.description: At a sparsely attended Conservative Political Action Conference, young Republicans were eager to start the post-Trump era.

dailyNews.title: As Trump Squeezes Cuba, U.S. Military Exists in a Bubble
dailyNews.description: The Navy base at Guantánamo Bay sparkles at night while neighbors across a Cuban minefield struggle in darkness driven by a Trump fuel embargo.

dailyNews.title: Private-Credit Wobbles Could Prove Perilous for Trump
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration is poised to broaden access to risky investments that are showing signs of strain.

dailyNews.title: Texas Border Wall Plan in Big Bend Draws Opposition From Republicans and Democrats
dailyNews.description: Plans for a wall in Big Bend National Park prompted public protests and behind-the-scenes lobbying to sway the Trump administration to stop.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Birthright Citizenship Order at Supreme Court Splits Conservative Scholars
dailyNews.description: Before President Trump’s order to limit birthright citizenship, there was widespread agreement that the 14th Amendment guaranteed citizenship for U.S.-born babies.

dailyNews.title: White House questioned about Trump's threat to target Iranian civilian infrastructure
dailyNews.description: During a press briefing, NBC News' Garrett Haake questioned White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt about President Trump's recent social media post threatening to target Iranian infrastructure, including electric generating and water desalinization plants.
